vocab.meaning: sự theo đuổi/tận hưởng một mình
vocab.example: Reading fantasy novels was a solitary indulgence that allowed me to escape into other worlds without distraction.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi mang tính hợp tác
vocab.example: I flourished in collaborative play, especially when my friends and I worked together to build complex LEGO cities.

vocab.meaning: sự bình yên trong nỗi cô độc/khi ở một mình
vocab.example: As an introverted child, I often found solace in solitude, spending hours drawing in my sketchbook.

vocab.meaning: người hướng ngoại, thích giao thiệp
vocab.example: I wasn't exactly a social butterfly, but I did enjoy the company of a few close-knit friends for board games.
Winning a football match felt rewarding because it required a communal effort and synchronized teamwork.

vocab.meaning: bản tính hay suy tư/nội tâm
vocab.example: Due to my introspective nature, I gravitated towards individual puzzles rather than high-energy group sports.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng liên nhân/giao tiếp giữa cá nhân
vocab.example: Engaging in group activities helped me hone my interpersonal skills, such as negotiation and empathy, at a young age.
There was a certain magic in the shared enthusiasm we felt when participating in neighborhood scavenger hunts.

vocab.meaning: nạp lại năng lượng tinh thần
vocab.example: After a long day at school, I preferred playing solo video games to recharge my mental batteries.
I found group dynamics quite overwhelming at times, so I tended to stick to one-on-one playdates.
